exception.justification: The pinned upstream Dify API image reports critical and high Trivy findings in bundled Debian, Node.js, and embedded utility binaries; keep it digest-pinned and review on the next image rotation window.
compensating_controls: Digest pin keeps the deployed image fixed to the reviewed upstream artifact while the exception is open.
The service is published only through the shared managed edge instead of exposing the container directly on the public host.
exception.remediation_plan: Re-scan and refresh dify_api_runtime with make upgrade-container-image IMAGE_ID=dify_api_runtime WRITE=true APPLY=true before the exception expires.
